note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step renders the chart and asserts against real output; pending = the chart is authored but its godog render/assert step definitions do not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior). Every scenario here is pending — the chart skeleton exists but no binding test does.

scenarios.name: A helm install brings up the full service set
The Helm chart is a first-class target at parity with compose
The values file is the single authoritative configuration contract
The grounder Deployment runs the same distroless binary image
Mutation stays disabled by default under the Phase 0/1 foundation
The public Service is auth-gated and the admin listener is not default-exposed
The grounder Deployment declares liveness and readiness probes ordered after Postgres
Credentials are sourced from Kubernetes Secrets and never rendered as literals
The runtime DSN uses the DML-only role and migration uses the DDL role
CI runs helm lint and template render on a chart change
CI fails when a rendered manifest contains a literal credential
